title: thrixspermum filiforme
intro: Thrixspermum filiforme, also known as the 'Filiform Orchid', is a type of flowering plant species in the orchid family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions. In terms of herbal preparations, Thrixspermum filiforme is often made into a decoction or infusion to be consumed as a tea.
